message:
feat: implement RecallStrategy with transcript search

Add RecallStrategy that extends CompactStrategy with a "recall" tool.
The tool spawns a sub-agent with transcript search tools to retrieve
information from compacted-away history.

Fix: Use variable for system prompt instead of constant address
Wire recall strategy into Session for both new and restored sessions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
